level_5.label: Absolute / Terminal
level_5.description: Captured at the moment of the event or within minutes of death. Historically indisputable.

level_4.label: Definitive / Locked
level_4.description: Widely accepted as the final public capture. No credible evidence of subsequent photos exists.

level_3.label: High Corroboration
level_3.description: Multiple independent sources confirm the timeline. Other angles from the same series may exist.

level_2.label: Probable Sequence
level_2.description: Strongest contender in the known timeline, though the date range allows for potential unrecorded sightings.

level_1.label: Plausible / Contested
level_1.description: Significant historical debate or multiple 'last' contenders exist without consensus.
